productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Victor Brown Formal Shoes
description: Classy, stylish and uber cool, these formal Victor slip-ons with a tapered square toe design from buckaroo are a must have in every suave man's collection. Since they have no laces and come in a slip-on design, you can get into and out of them with utmost ease. Made from high quality leather, these shoes are comfortable enough to be worn all-day long. When it's time for power dressing, it's time to wear these shoes! Upper Full grain leather upper for added durability and style Tapered square design for added attraction Leather overlay with stitch detailing on forefoot for better structure and style Hidden elastic gores on either side for a more versatile Fit Laceless design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand badge on lateral side of midfoot Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured pattern with grooves for better traction on all surfaces Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
